name: American Express Platinum Travel Credit Card
exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms
milestoneBenefits: 7,500 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 1.9 lakh in a cardmembership year
10,000 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 4 lakh in a cardmembership year
22,500 Membership Rewards points and a Taj stay voucher worth Rs 10,000 on spending Rs 7 lakh in a cardmembership year

1 Membership Rewards point for every Rs 50 spent except excluded categories

8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 2 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership with annual membership fee waived
Higher-value redemption through Platinum Travel Collection
